case_title: JORLI FLORES et al VS. KARLA HERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,310.00 FILED BY FLORES, JORLI PEREZ, AMARILIS AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, KARLA FLORES, SANDRA WONG, KEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED JAN-19-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, KARLA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-30-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE THE OWNER, KEN WONG. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFFS, AMENDING CLAIM TO INCLUDE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT. (PER FEB-22-2011 DIRECTION OF JUDGE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, JORLI PEREZ, AMARILIS
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,310.00 FILED BY FLORES, JORLI PEREZ, AMARILIS AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, KARLA FLORES, SANDRA WONG, KEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED MAR-13-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED MAR-10-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, SANDRA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED MAR-10-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, KARLA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO KARLA HERNANDEZ, AND SANDRA FLORES BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-30-2011 AT 3:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, JORLI PEREZ, AMARILIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, KEN $1,310.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,340.00, CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANTS SANDRA FLORES AND KARLA HERNANDEZ ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (JORLI FLORES JUDGMENT = $655.00; AMARLIS PEREZ JUDGMENT = $655.00) TOTAL $1310.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
